data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Real-time availability sync to ClassPass', but there is no evidence that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for real-time availability sync, yet the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence of this capability being tested or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to ClassPass.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
